name: Rise Rank-Up-Magic Raidraptor's Force
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ЯＲＵＭ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ライズランクアップマジック</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－レイド・ラプターズ・フォース
name_jp_rom: Raizu Rankuappu Majikku - Reido Raputāzu Fōsu
desc: During the Main Phase or your opponent's Battle Phase: Target 2 or more "Raidraptor" Xyz Monsters you control and/or in your GY, including a monster on the field; if at least 2 remain face-up at resolution, Special Summon 1 "Raidraptor" Xyz Monster from your Extra Deck with a Rank equal to their combined Ranks, and if you do, attach the targeted monsters to it as material. (This is treated as an Xyz Summon. Transfer their materials to the Summoned monster.) You can only activate 1 "Rise Rank-Up-Magic Raidraptor's Force" per turn.
eff: During the Main Phase or your opponent's Battle Phase: Target 2 or more "Raidraptor" Xyz Monsters you control and/or in your GY, including a monster on the field; if at least 2 remain face-up at resolution, Special Summon 1 "Raidraptor" Xyz Monster from your Extra Deck with a Rank equal to their combined Ranks, and if you do, attach the targeted monsters to it as material. (This is treated as an Xyz Summon. Transfer their materials to the Summoned monster.) You can only activate 1 "Rise Rank-Up-Magic Raidraptor's Force" per turn.

action: Attaches from your field as Xyz Material
Attaches from your Graveyard as Xyz Material
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
Treats Special Summon as Xyz Summon
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
